Dockerfile should only have one CMD instruction. Only the last CMD will have an effect.

Variable references should be enclosed in double quotes to prevent globbing and word splitting. Unquoted variables can cause issues when they contain whitespaces or shell glob characters (*). Use "$VAR" or "${VAR}" instead of $VAR or ${VAR}.
